method: HTML runtime marker inspection plus CDN/path validation. Full gameplay still requires browser playthrough because HTML5 games do not expose a universal headless pass/fail API.

rows.title: Candy Crush HTML5
rows.notes: HTML5 bundle imports successfully and is wired to the Seby Games iframe player.
